message:
Fix RuntimeBuilder rename in happy_eyeballs test and update loss recovery test vectors

happy_eyeballs.rs: Update test to use RuntimeBuilder (renamed from
Builder) to match the current runtime API.

transport.rs: Update on_loss_congestion test call sites to pass the
required now_micros parameter following the signature change in the
previous commit. Adjusts test vectors to properly exercise the
recovery epoch gating with distinct send-time vs detection-time values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
